summary:
I rebuilt the auth server after patching the comparison function to use constant-time comparison.

Now running the test to verify:

```
=== Timing Attack Resistance Test ===
--- Building ---
--- Basic auth test ---
OK: correct password accepted
OK: wrong password rejected
--- Timing side-channel analysis ---
Running security analysis on compareHashes...
  Static analysis: uses crypto/subtle.ConstantTimeCompare
OK: compareHashes uses constant-time comparison
PASS: All security tests passed
```

The test passed! The needle was a timing side-channel vulnerability in the password hash comparison function (`auth/compare.go`), which I fixed by using `crypto/subtle.ConstantTimeCompare`.
